codeReview.summary: Clean monorepo conversion. All Next.js files correctly moved to apps/web/ with @totus/web package name. Root package.json properly configured with workspaces: ['apps/*', 'packages/*'] and husky as the only devDependency. Husky pre-commit updated to cd into apps/web for lint-staged. .env.local correctly moved to apps/web/. docker-compose.yml remains at root. CLI skeleton (packages/cli/) created with proper structure. All 642 tests pass, typecheck and lint clean. The 229 files changed are almost entirely renames (0-byte diffs) with only package.json files and a few new CLI files having actual content changes.

issues.description: tsconfig has both 'noEmit: true' and 'outDir: ./dist'. These are contradictory — with noEmit, the 'build: tsc' script will never produce output files in dist/. The bin entry in package.json points to ./dist/index.js which won't exist after build. Non-blocking since CLI is a skeleton and a subsequent commit (c8cbcdb) may address this.

Six new WebFetch domain permissions were added (wearipedia, tryterra, clig.dev, cli.github.com, caduh.com, docs.stripe.com) that are unrelated to the monorepo conversion feature. These appear to be research domains for the CLI/MCP work and should ideally be in a separate commit. Non-blocking — no functional impact.

Pre-commit hook only runs lint-staged in apps/web/. As packages/cli/ grows with real code, commits touching only CLI files won't be linted. This is acceptable for now since CLI is a skeleton, but should be extended when CLI has linting configured.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker included unrelated .claude/settings.local.json changes (research domain whitelist) in the monorepo conversion commit. AGENTS.md doesn't mention commit hygiene guidelines (one concern per commit). Minor — no functional impact.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .claude/settings.local.json diff in commit 3b9c36f adds 6 WebFetch domains unrelated to monorepo conversion.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the scaffold-worker procedure correctly: checked existing state, implemented scaffolding, verified all tooling commands (test, typecheck, lint, dev, docker). Skill feedback suggests adding guidance about pre-existing DB state issues when running baseline tests, which is reasonable.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff verification shows 9 commands run successfully. skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true with no deviations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The environment.md library file correctly documents .env.local location as 'apps/web/' and the packageManager quirk. AGENTS.md project structure section is accurate for post-monorepo layout. services.yaml was updated in the preparatory commit (34ae299) before the conversion. All shared state is consistent.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/environment.md header says '.env.local in apps/web/', .factory/services.yaml uses 'cd apps/web' paths, AGENTS.md shows post-monorepo structure.

summary: The monorepo conversion is well-executed. All 229 files were properly reorganized into the apps/web/ and packages/cli/ structure. Root package.json is minimal with only workspaces config and husky. apps/web/package.json retains all dependencies with correct @totus/web naming. All verification criteria met: 642 tests pass, typecheck clean, lint clean, dev server starts on port 3000, docker compose works, husky hooks function from root. Three non-blocking issues found: CLI tsconfig noEmit/outDir contradiction, unrelated .claude/settings changes in commit, and pre-commit hook only covering apps/web. Overall: PASS.
